title: hypecoum procumbens subsp. procumbens
intro: Hypecoum procumbens subsp. procumbens, also known as woodland catchfly, is a flowering plant species native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and bloating. The health benefits of Hypecoum procumbens subsp. procumbens include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Traditionally, the plant has been used to make herbal preparations, such as teas and tinctures, which are taken to alleviate digestive issues and promote overall well-being.
